ns0:entry.ns0:title: Canner/WrenAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Canner/WrenAI
Language: typescript
Open-source text-to-SQL and text-to-chart GenBI agent with a semantic layer. Ask your database questions in natural language — get accurate SQL, charts, and BI insights. Supports 12+ data sources (PostgreSQL, BigQuery, Snowflake, etc.) and any LLM (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
Language: typescript
Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coder/mux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coder/mux
Language: typescript
A desktop app for isolated, parallel agentic development

ns0:entry.ns0:title: czlonkowski/n8n-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp
Language: typescript
A MCP for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Windsurf / Cursor to build n8n workflows for you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dreamhunter2333/cloudflare_temp_email
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dreamhunter2333/cloudflare_temp_email
Language: typescript
CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fluxerapp/fluxer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fluxerapp/fluxer
Language: typescript
A free and open source instant messaging and VoIP platform built for friends, groups, and communities. Self-hosting and more activity in this repository is coming very soon! See the README.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
Language: typescript
freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langfuse/langfuse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langfuse/langfuse
Language: typescript
🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
Language: typescript
Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

ns0:entry.ns0:title: steipete/mcporter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/steipete/mcporter
Language: typescript
Call MCPs via TypeScript, masquerading as simple TypeScript API. Or package them as cli.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: typescript
A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: twentyhq/twenty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/twentyhq/twenty
Language: typescript
Building a modern alternative to Salesforce, powered by the community.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vas3k/TaxHacker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vas3k/TaxHacker
Language: typescript
Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories
